dissent_flag.dissent_reason: Internals agent flagged explicit risk-on sector rotation (XLK +0.98%, XLE +1.62% both exceeding 0.5% threshold) as accumulation-into-dip signal contradicting bearish sentiment — narrow-breadth energy/tech leadership suggests institutional buying, not panic liquidation, raising gap-fill probability within first 30-60 minutes.

validator_assessment.weakest_link: The overnight gap-down (+0.91 pts) is assumed to represent sustained institutional selling conviction capable of defending 740.73 and driving through to 736.52 — but no macro catalyst anchors it, and the concurrent risk-on sector rotation (XLK/XLE) plus heavy EOD accumulation volume (83.5k vs 15-30k avg) suggest the gap was gamma rebalancing, not directional selling, making early reversion within 30-90 minutes a high-probability invalidation.
validator_assessment.top_invalidation_scenario: SPY fills overnight gap and holds above 739.20 by 09:50 ET (first 20 minutes) on volume > 100k — evaporates overnight bearish sentiment and forces pivot reclaim assessment.

primary.condition: if SPY tests 740.73 Carry resistance and holds (rejection candle + ribbon intact)

secondary.condition: if SPY breaks and closes above 740.73 decisively with ribbon reclaim

invalidation.condition: SPY fills overnight gap and holds above 739.20 (prior close) by 09:50 ET on volume > 100k, OR SPY holds pivot EMA (738.95) for 15+ minutes by 10:00 ET on volume > 120k
invalidation.effect: Gap-fill on heavy volume signals overnight gap was gamma rebalancing not directional conviction — bearish ribbon thesis evaporates, bears abandon 740.73 defense, early bull flag triggers consideration of secondary scenario ahead of schedule. Both Technical and Macro bearish conviction collapse if this fires.

swarm_predictions.claim: 740.73 Carry resistance is tested within the first 90 minutes of RTH (by 11:00 ET) and fails to break — SPY rejects and fades at least 1.50 pts back below 739.23 within 30 minutes of the test.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY closes a 5-minute bar above 740.80 and holds there for two consecutive bars before 11:00 ET, confirming a Carry level break and ribbon reclaim.

swarm_predictions.claim: VIX remains at or above 18.50 through 11:00 ET, sustaining MID regime without an intraday collapse below 18.00, consistent with persistent risk-off undertone supporting the bearish directional setup.
swarm_predictions.invalidation: VIX drops below 18.00 by 10:30 ET — a 4.4% intraday reversal from 18.84 — signaling fear premium evaporation and eliminating the primary macro bearish catalyst.

swarm_predictions.claim: SPY ribbon remains in CLEAN_BEAR stack configuration (slow EMA > pivot EMA > fast EMA, spread >= 30 cents) through the first 60 minutes of RTH trading (i.e., through 10:30 ET), with price staying below the pivot EMA (738.95).
swarm_predictions.invalidation: SPY closes above the pivot EMA (738.95) and ribbon spread compresses below 20 cents by 10:30 ET — confirming the overnight gap-down was a false directional signal and EOD accumulation volume was the true structural signal.

synthesis_narrative: The swarm votes 3-of-4 bearish with a weighted score of 0.90, anchored by a CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (40c spread), gap-down 0.91 pts, rising VIX (+2.56% to MID 18.84), and the 740.73 Carry gatekeeper framing — but the validator assigns only moderate robustness because no macro event anchors the overnight gap and the internals (XLK/XLE both risk-on) plus heavy EOD accumulation volume (83.5k, 3-5x average) are textbook dip-buying signals that make a gap-fill in the first 20-30 minutes a high-probability invalidation scenario. The single most important thing to watch at market open is whether SPY reclaims and holds the prior close (739.20) within the first 20 minutes on volume > 100k — that alone is sufficient to invalidate the bearish thesis; absent that, the bear case holds and 736.52 Active support is the first downside target.

technical.one_line: CLEAN_BEAR ribbon (40c spread, slow 739.21 > pivot 738.95 > fast 738.80) + price 66c below pivot + 91c gap-down; last 3 bars green (institutional EOD buying) introduces mixed bar structure but doesn't override ribbon.

macro.one_line: VIX MID regime rising +2.56% to 18.84 supports bearish premium expansion; no macro events today (CPI/Retail Sales not until Thursday 5/14); risk-on sector rotation (XLK/XLE) tempers conviction to moderate.

level_thesis.one_line: Battle level 740.73 (5-day Carry resistance, 2★) is the gatekeeper — holds = bears target 736.52 Active support; breaks decisively = bulls reclaim ribbon toward 743.0; 739.0 round-number acts as first soft resistance.

internals.one_line: Risk-on rotation confirmed: XLK +0.98%, XLE +1.62% both above 0.5% threshold; breadth narrow (energy-driven, XLF -0.16% flat); signals accumulation into gap-down rather than fear-selling, contradicting bearish consensus.

validator.top_invalidation: Gap-fill above 739.20 by 09:50 ET on volume > 100k evaporates overnight bearish sentiment — overnight gap was gamma rebalancing, not directional conviction; heavy EOD accumulation volume (83.5k) was institutional buying missed by bearish agents.
